patch.value: Dead code: root-level facade re-export shims unused

Files src/output.ts, src/errors.ts, src/lock.ts, src/id.ts, src/time.ts, src/paths.ts, src/parse.ts, src/constants.ts, src/settings.ts, src/item-store.ts, src/item-format.ts, src/history.ts, src/fs-utils.ts, src/serialization.ts, src/command-types.ts are single-line re-exports of core/ modules but are never imported anywhere. Legacy shims from pre-restructure.
